articles.description: ‘People should be alarmed. This is a health crisis. It’s also an economic crisis.’
articles.content: Alzheimers disease and related dementias will cost the U.S. about $818 billion this year, driven by medical expenses, as well as the often overlooked costs such as diminished quality of life, lost ea… [+577 chars]
